series_metadata.series_description: Licensure regarding dealer’s ie (Lowes , Meijer, and landscaping firms) who have bought plants from nurseries and are re-selling. Encompasses all documents needed to be licensed, inspected, and reporting i.e. (application, inspection reports, reports.)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep final expiration, including all renewals, or denial. ; Electronic: Keep final expiration, including all renewals, or denial
